targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.ecosystem,
  d.tenant_id,
  COALESCE(r.parent_id, '') AS environment,
  COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id) AS resource_name,
  d.resource_id,
  d.product_category,
  d.product_type,
  COALESCE(i.display_name, d.identity_id) AS identity_name,
  d.identity_id,
  d.cost_type,
  d.allocation_method,
  d.allocation_detail,
  f.timestamp,
  CAST(f.amount AS REAL) AS amount
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
LEFT JOIN identities i ON i.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND i.identity_id = d.identity_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND d.product_category IN (${product_category:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
ORDER BY f.timestamp DESC, amount DESC
LIMIT 1000
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  d.ecosystem,
  d.tenant_id,
  COALESCE(r.parent_id, '') AS environment,
  COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id) AS resource_name,
  d.resource_id,
  d.product_category,
  d.product_type,
  COALESCE(i.display_name, d.identity_id) AS identity_name,
  d.identity_id,
  d.cost_type,
  d.allocation_method,
  d.allocation_detail,
  f.timestamp,
  CAST(f.amount AS REAL) AS amount
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
LEFT JOIN identities i ON i.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND i.identity_id = d.identity_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND d.product_category IN (${product_category:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
ORDER BY f.timestamp DESC, amount DESC
LIMIT 1000

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  b.ecosystem,
  b.tenant_id,
  b.resource_id,
  b.product_category,
  b.product_type,
  SUM(b.quantity) AS quantity,
  SUM(CAST(b.total_cost AS REAL)) AS total
FROM billing b
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.product_category IN (${product_category:sqlstring})
  AND b.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY b.ecosystem, b.tenant_id, b.resource_id, b.product_category, b.product_type
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 1000
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  b.ecosystem,
  b.tenant_id,
  b.resource_id,
  b.product_category,
  b.product_type,
  SUM(b.quantity) AS quantity,
  SUM(CAST(b.total_cost AS REAL)) AS total
FROM billing b
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.product_category IN (${product_category:sqlstring})
  AND b.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY b.ecosystem, b.tenant_id, b.resource_id, b.product_category, b.product_type
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 1000

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.ecosystem,
  d.tenant_id,
  d.resource_id,
  d.product_category,
  d.product_type,
  d.cost_type,
  f.timestamp,
  CAST(f.amount AS REAL) AS amount
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.identity_id = 'UNALLOCATED'
  AND d.product_category IN (${product_category:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
ORDER BY f.timestamp DESC, amount DESC
LIMIT 1000

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.ecosystem,
  d.tenant_id,
  COALESCE(r.parent_id, '') AS environment,
  COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id) AS resource_name,
  d.product_category,
  d.product_type,
  d.identity_id,
  d.allocation_detail AS issue_reason,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS total_cost
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND d.allocation_detail IS NOT NULL
  AND d.allocation_detail != ''
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.ecosystem, d.tenant_id, r.parent_id, r.display_name,
         d.resource_id, d.product_category, d.product_type,
         d.identity_id, d.allocation_detail
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  d.ecosystem,
  d.tenant_id,
  COALESCE(r.parent_id, '') AS environment,
  COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id) AS resource_name,
  d.product_category,
  d.product_type,
  d.identity_id,
  d.allocation_detail AS issue_reason,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS total_cost
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND d.allocation_detail IS NOT NULL
  AND d.allocation_detail != ''
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.ecosystem, d.tenant_id, r.parent_id, r.display_name,
         d.resource_id, d.product_category, d.product_type,
         d.identity_id, d.allocation_detail
ORDER BY total_cost DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  r.ecosystem,
  r.tenant_id,
  r.resource_id,
  r.display_name,
  r.resource_type,
  r.parent_id,
  r.status,
  r.last_seen_at
FROM resources r
WHERE r.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
ORDER BY r.tenant_id, r.resource_type, r.display_name

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT r.parent_id AS environment
FROM resources r
WHERE r.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL
list.name: environment

FROM resources r
WHERE r.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL
